text_block_list.text:
I'm walking Hishi Amazon through the training
regimen, but something is really bugging me...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Hm? Oh, just bedhead—or bedtail, I guess.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
It wasn't completely dry before I went to sleep
last night. The younger students in the dorm had
the same reaction as you.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
But yeah... stuff like this happens to the best of
us. More importantly...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Yawn... Huh, what was I talkin' about again?

Hishi Amazon looks like she's about to fall asleep
any second. She must be exhausted. It might be
best to adjust her race schedule.
